caption: A man performs a demonstration with a long staff in a large banquet hall with beige walls and a blue carpeted floor. He is dressed in a dark blue long-sleeved tunic and matching pants. In the initial scene, he holds the staff diagonally overhead, lunging forward. He then transitions to a standing position, holding the staff vertically. As the sequence progresses, he moves toward the left side of the frame, continuing to hold the staff upright while maintaining a focused expression. In the background, a large audience of people in various attire sits at round tables covered with white tablecloths, watching the performance. The room is illuminated by bright ceiling lights and several vertical light fixtures on the walls. A large, ornate chandelier hangs from the ceiling. No on-screen text or logos are visible.
